name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug

---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14 / Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Node.js version | `node -v` |
| Router model | e.g. GL-iNet BE6500 |
| OpenWrt version | e.g. 23.05.3 |
| Smart Homelab version | e.g. v1.1.0 |

## Logs

Relevant output from `logs/collect.log` or `logs/server.log`:

```
paste logs here
```

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
